content: A sales prospecting AI agent team can be structured as an agent-orchestrated answering ensemble, where each specialist agent responds to a different 'question' a prospect implicitly asks during early outreach: what problem does this solve, is this worth my time, should I take this meeting. Orchestration patterns (concurrent, handoff, group chat) from answering ensembles can be repurposed to coordinate these prospecting agents to tailor outreach to each lead's unstated needs.
